channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VEDL] Hindustan Zinc Declares ₹11 Interim Dividend for FY27
item.description:
Vedanta Ltd informs that its subsidiary, Hindustan Zinc Limited (HZL), declared a first interim dividend of ₹11 per equity share (550% on face value of ₹2) for the Financial Year 2026-27, amounting to ₹4648 crores. HZL also reported audited consolidated and standalone financial results for Q4 and the year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, M/s M S K A & Associates LLP were appointed as the Statutory Auditors of the Company.

  • HZL declares first interim dividend of ₹11 per share for FY27.
  • Total dividend payout amounts to ₹4648 crores.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were submitted by HZL.
  • M/s M S K A & Associates LLP appointed as Statutory Auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedanta Limited | Category: Dividend

item.title: [M&MFIN] M&M Fin Services raises borrowing limit to ₹1,75,000 Cr; appoints new director
item.description:
Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Ltd's Board of Directors approved increasing the aggregate borrowing limits from ₹1,50,000 Crore to ₹1,75,000 Crore under Section 180(1)(c) of the Companies Act 2013. This includes fund raises through Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) and other instruments, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM). The Board also consolidated and updated borrowing-related authorizations, maintaining the NCD sub-limit at ₹65,000 Crore. Additionally, Mr. Krishna Kumar Sukumaran Nair was appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive and Non-Independent) representing Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC), effective June 23, 2026. LIC holds a 10.26% stake in the company. Changes in Senior Management Personnel were also approved. The 36th AGM is scheduled for July 21, 2026, where shareholders will vote on these and other matters, including material related party transactions with LIC.

  • Borrowing limits increased by ₹25,000 Cr to ₹1,75,000 Cr, pending shareholder approval.
  • New Non-Executive Non-Independent Director appointed, representing LIC's 10.26% stake.
  • Board approved changes in Senior Management Personnel.
  • Shareholders to vote on borrowing limit increase and director appointments at the AGM.
  • NCD issuance sub-limit remains at ₹65,000 Cr within overall borrowing limits.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [BEEZAASAN] Beezaasan Commences Detonating Fuse Production at New Gujarat Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Beezaasan Explotech Ltd has successfully commenced production of Detonating Fuse (DF) at its new manufacturing plant located in Bhantala, Gujarat, effective April 24, 2026. This significant milestone is expected to enhance the company's manufacturing capacity and improve operational efficiency within the explosives and defence segment.

  • Production of Detonating Fuse commenced at new Gujarat plant.
  • Expected to boost manufacturing capacity for explosives/defence.
  • Aims to improve operational efficiency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Beezaasan Explotech Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [SPAR] Sparc Electrex: Niki Singh appointed CS; ED Suresh Vishwanathan resigns
item.description:
Sparc Electrex Ltd held a Board meeting on April 24, 2026. During the meeting, Ms. Niki Singh (ACS: 76031) was appointed as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective immediately. Concurrently, Mr. Suresh Vishwanathan (DIN: 02310679) resigned from his position as Executive Director, also effective April 24, 2026. The Board also authorized Ms. Niki Singh, in her capacity as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, to determine the materiality of events or information and make necessary disclosures to the Stock Exchange, as per Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The Board also took note of compliance done for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Ms. Niki Singh appointed Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.
  • Mr. Suresh Vishwanathan resigned as Executive Director.
  • Ms. Niki Singh authorized for materiality determination and disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sparc Electrex Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SATINDLTD] Aeroflex subsidiary acquires remaining 49% in Madhura Compressors
item.description:
🔥 Trending

M.R. Organisation Limited, a subsidiary of Aeroflex Enterprises Ltd, has acquired the remaining 49% equity stake in Madhura Compressors Private Limited. This acquisition makes Madhura Compressors Private Limited a wholly-owned subsidiary of M.R. Organisation Limited. The move consolidates Aeroflex's control over Madhura Compressors, potentially streamlining operations and enhancing synergy benefits.

  • Aeroflex's subsidiary acquired the remaining 49% stake.
  • Madhura Compressors is now a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • This move consolidates control and operational synergies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAT INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VBCFERROQ] Chrome Silicon Board Reconstitutes Committee for Manufacturing Recommencement
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Chrome Silicon Ltd. convened a meeting on April 24, 2026, where they reviewed the company's affairs. Following the resignation of Mr. Hirak Kumar Basu, the Board reconstituted a Committee of Directors. This committee, comprising Mr. I.N. Rao (Independent Director), Mr. P. Raju (Independent Director), and Mr. P.V. Rao (Whole-Time Director), has been tasked with evaluating the feasibility of recommencing the company's manufacturing operations. The committee is expected to submit its recommendations to the Board for consideration and decision in due course.

  • Board of Directors reviewed company affairs on April 24, 2026.
  • Committee of Directors reconstituted after a management resignation.
  • New committee to examine feasibility of recommencing manufacturing operations.
  • Committee includes two Independent Directors and one Whole-Time Director.
  • Recommendations will be submitted to the Board for future decisions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VBC FERRO ALLOYS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TAVERNIER] Eforu Entertainment Board Meeting Rescheduled to May 1, 2026
item.description:
Eforu Entertainment Ltd. has announced a change in the schedule for its Board of Directors meeting. Originally slated for Friday, April 24, 2026, the meeting has been re-scheduled to Friday, May 1, 2026, citing "certain exigencies." The purpose of the meeting, which is to consider and approve various agenda items, remains unchanged. This intimation is made in compliance with Regulation 29 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting re-scheduled to May 1, 2026.
  • Original meeting was scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • Rescheduling is due to certain exigencies.
  • Agenda items for the meeting remain unchanged.
  • Filing is in accordance with SEBI Regulation 29.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tavernier Resources Limi | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CRANEX] Cranex Ltd: ₹7.08 Cr Warrants Forfeited
item.description:
Cranex Ltd has forfeited ₹7.089 Cr received as initial subscription amount for 7,60,000 convertible warrants. The warrant holders failed to exercise their conversion option within 18 months from the allotment date, as per Regulation 169(3) of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The warrants were issued at ₹102 per warrant, with 25% paid upfront. Allottees including Gaurav Singh, Bhavya Jain, and Niveshaay Hedgehogs LLP did not convert their warrants by the April 24, 2026 deadline.

  • Cranex Ltd forfeits warrants due to non-conversion by holders.
  • ₹7.089 Cr forfeited from 7,60,000 warrants not converted.
  • Warrants issued at ₹102 with 25% initial payment.
  • Conversion deadline was April 24, 2026, 18 months post-allotment.
  • Forfeiture as per SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CRANEX LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [BENGALASM] Bengal & Assam Co. securities admitted to NSE Capital Market Segment
item.description:
Bengal & Assam Company Ltd announced that its securities have been admitted for trading on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) Capital Market Segment. This admission, effective April 20, 2026, was communicated via an NSE circular dated April 17, 2026. The company's symbol on NSE will be BENGALASM with ISIN INE083K01017. This move allows investors to trade the company's shares on the NSE, potentially enhancing its market presence and liquidity. The filing also included an annexure listing other companies whose securities were admitted to dealings on the NSE from the same effective date.

  • Bengal & Assam Co. securities admitted to NSE Capital Market Segment.
  • Trading on NSE to commence from April 20, 2026.
  • This expands market presence and liquidity for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BENGAL & ASSAM COMPANY LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [EASYFIN] Easy Fincorp Revised Shareholding Pattern for Dec 31, 2015
item.description:
Easy Fincorp Ltd has submitted the revised shareholding pattern for the quarter ended December 31, 2015, following a query from BSE regarding the non-submission of the shareholding pattern. The company clarifies that the initial filing was made on January 18, 2016, but not in the updated format prescribed by SEBI. The company is also seeking advice on submitting the shareholding pattern in XBRL format due to revisions in SEBI's format since the initial circular.

  • Easy Fincorp submits revised shareholding pattern for Q3 2016 after BSE query.
  • Initial filing was made on time but not in the updated SEBI format.
  • Company seeks guidance on XBRL format submission due to SEBI revisions.
  • Promoter & Promoter Group holds 49.6739% of the shares.
  • Public holds 50.3261% of the shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Fincorp Ltd | Category: Shareholding
